news.t: Cabana Asset Management Announces Transfer of ETF Lineup to Nasdaq

overview.description: The ETC Cabana Target Beta ETF (TDSB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds which aims to provide long-term growth that adjusts an asset allocation to pursue a targeted risk parameter of 7% from peak to trough. TDSB was launched on Sep 16, 2020 and is issued by Exchange Traded Concepts.
